name: GIGABYTE B660M AORUS ELITE AX DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - Intel 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE B660M AORUS ELITE AX DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR4, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for mid-range compact builds.
